dashboard.setup_banner_description: Set up your expiry thresholds first so products and batches can be tracked.

products.setup_banner_description: Set up your expiry thresholds first so products and batches can be tracked.
products.toolbar_banner: Add expiry dates to track, tap Batch to review details.

instructions.subtitle: Your Quick Guide to Efficient Expiry Management
instructions.description: An intelligent system that monitors your inventory step-by-step, alerts you before expiration, and secures your revenue through automated discounts and smart product visibility control.
instructions.footer_note: Harees · Your smart partner against inventory waste
instructions.step1_desc: Move your store categories and classify them into long, medium, or short-term based on the nature of your products expiration, allowing the system to track each category accurately with the duration that suits it.
instructions.step2_desc: On the products page, click 'Add Expiry Date' to open the entry form. If the product is standard, you can add the batch and its quantity directly, while if it contains options like: colors and sizes, you will be able to easily distribute the batch quantity across these options. If there is a shortage in product stock or option details, a button appears to facilitate your transition directly to your Salla store dashboard to update them before scheduling dates.
instructions.step3_desc: The system tracks your inventory batches and sends instant alerts for approaching and expired batches. Finally, the Auto-Hide feature conceals the product from your store only when all its batches are fully expired.
instructions.step4_desc: To save your time, you can enable 'Auto-Discount' to instantly apply discounts for approaching batches; if disabled later, current active discounts remain until their set duration ends. A 'Manual Discount' button appears only if auto-discount is off, and disappears when active to prevent overlap, with all these cases cleanly tracked and displayed in the dashboard table.

setup_banner.default_description: Set up your expiry thresholds first so products and batches can be tracked.

monitored_products_table.empty_needs_setup: Configure your settings to start monitoring products.

batch_row.toast_error_fallback: An error occurred while applying the discount

discount_modal.note_body: Discounts apply only to Yellow-status batches. Green inventory is always protected.
discount_modal.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

expiry_modal.zero_no_stock_body: To create expiry batches, your product needs stock in the inventory. Add quantity in Salla first, then come back to set expiry dates.
expiry_modal.zero_go_to_salla: Go to Salla to add stock
expiry_modal.question_subtitle: e.g. size, color or any other variant — quantity will be split per option.
expiry_modal.question_yes: Yes — add options in Salla first

threshold_card.card_subtitle: Set the remaining days to classify a batch under "Yellow Status" and receive an instant notification.
threshold_card.card_hint: Example: Mark the batch as Yellow Status and remind me [10] days before the expiration date.

automation_card.auto_hide_desc: Hide the product from your Salla store once all of its batches expire.
automation_card.auto_hide_before_desc: Hide the product this many days before expiry (set to 0 to hide only on expiry).
automation_card.auto_discount_desc: Apply an automatic discount to all batches nearing expiration
automation_card.auto_discount_hint: Note: If disabled later, active discounts on current batches will remain until the discount duration ends.

category_mapping_card.card_description: Your store categories are ready. Move each into the correct section to start monitoring and tracking product expiry.
